root_query: photonic crystal optical sensor sensitivity limit of detection gas biosensing refractive index

included: photonic crystals used as optical sensors
photonic crystal fibers for gas or refractive-index sensing
excluded: general photonics papers without sensing targets
duplicate review values when the primary article is available

queries_or_inputs: PDF metadata title, DOI, abstract, and first-page text
source_search_strategy.purpose: Identify the already downloaded source files and align them with stable source_id values.
Verify DOI landing pages, access conditions, and likely extraction targets.

queries_or_inputs: Wang 2022 MOF photonic crystal gas sensing review
Yu 2020 hollow-core photonic crystal fiber gas sensing review
source_search_strategy.purpose: Use reviews to find primary experimental papers and coverage gaps.

priority_sources.reason: Open-access primary paper with several directly reported sensor metrics for a MOF-based 3D photonic crystal.
Open-access primary paper with explicit RI sensitivity, gas targets, and response/recovery behavior.
Recent open-access biosensing example that expands the dataset beyond gas sensing.
Primary plasmonic/photonic hybrid sensor paper with glucose and refractive-index sensing metrics.
Primary on-chip gas-sensing paper; extract only values that are reproducibly available under allowed access.

conflict_resolution_rules: Prefer a primary experimental article over a review or database summary.
Prefer supplementary tables over plotted values when both report the same metric.
If abstract, table, and figure values disagree, keep the table value and document the conflict in notes.
Keep simulation-only records only when notes explicitly mark them as theoretical.
Do not redistribute third-party supplemental datasets unless the source license allows it.
Record the originally reported unit first; unit normalization is deferred to the cleaning practice.
coverage_gaps: Few negative or low-performance sensor examples are represented.
Humidity, temperature cross-sensitivity, and long-term stability are not consistently reported.
Biosensing coverage is limited compared with gas and refractive-index sensing.
No reliable open ML benchmark dataset was selected for direct ingestion during this practice.

scientific_papers.name: Wang et al. 2022 - UiO-66 3D photonic crystal optical sensor for chlorobenzene vapor
scientific_papers.license: RSC open-access article license; verify exact reuse terms before redistribution

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: publisher HTML plus manual PDF verification
extraction_strategy.target_content: abstract, sensing-performance section, figures and any tables with sensitivity, LOD, quality factor, selectivity, response time, and recovery time

scientific_papers.notes: Primary source for UiO-66 MOF-based 3D photonic crystal chlorobenzene vapor sensing.

scientific_papers.name: Nazeri et al. 2020 - Hollow-core photonic crystal fiber Mach-Zehnder interferometer for gas sensing
scientific_papers.access_method: publisher HTML/PDF download; PMC full-text HTML mirror for scriptable web extraction

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: publisher HTML extraction for text values and manual verification against figures
extraction_strategy.target_content: abstract, experimental results, cyclic gas detection plots, response/recovery-time discussion

scientific_papers.notes: Contains explicit RI sensitivity for the hollow-core PCF MZI sensor and multiple pure-gas measurements.

scientific_papers.name: Dolci et al. 2025 - Fiber-tip photonic crystal for real-time referenced biosensing in serum

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: manual PDF extraction with figure and caption verification
extraction_strategy.target_content: biosensing response curves, detection limit, serum measurements, referencing method

scientific_papers.notes: Recent biosensing source; useful to balance the dataset against gas-only sources.

scientific_papers.name: Shaban et al. 2017 - Tunability and sensing properties of plasmonic/1D photonic crystal
scientific_papers.access_method: publisher HTML/PDF download; PMC full-text HTML mirror for scriptable web extraction

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: manual PDF extraction and figure digitization only when plotted values are not tabulated
extraction_strategy.target_content: SPR/PBG wavelength shifts, refractive-index response, glucose concentration response

scientific_papers.notes: Primary plasmonic/photonic hybrid source; includes chemical and glucose sensing examples.

scientific_papers.name: Zaky et al. 2020 - Refractive index gas sensor based on the Tamm state in a one-dimensional photonic crystal
scientific_papers.access_method: publisher HTML/PDF download; PMC full-text HTML mirror for scriptable web extraction

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: manual extraction from abstract and optimization figures
extraction_strategy.target_content: sensitivity, detection limit, theoretical optimization parameters

scientific_papers.notes: Theoretical/simulation source; records must be clearly marked as theoretical if extracted.

scientific_papers.name: Chong et al. 2018 - Surface-enhanced infrared absorption for on-chip gas sensing
scientific_papers.access_method: DOI landing page and locally stored PDF
scientific_papers.license: ACS publisher terms; reuse not assumed

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: manual PDF extraction with license check before reusing supporting information
extraction_strategy.target_content: gas detection metrics, SEIRA enhancement and on-chip sensing performance

scientific_papers.notes: Use as a plasmonic/nanophotonic gas-sensing source; verify access and reuse terms before publishing derived tables.

scientific_papers.name: Wang et al. 2022 - Metal-organic framework-based photonic crystal platforms for gas sensing: a review
scientific_papers.license: RSC open-access article license; verify exact reuse terms before redistribution

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: snowballing only unless primary source is inaccessible
extraction_strategy.target_content: reference list and summary tables for MOF-photonic crystal gas sensors

scientific_papers.notes: Use primarily to identify primary articles and compare terminology; do not prefer review values over primary papers.

scientific_papers.name: Yu et al. 2020 - Hollow-core photonic crystal fiber gas sensing

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: snowballing and terminology harmonization
extraction_strategy.target_content: HC-PCF gas-sensing principles, target gases, performance ranges

scientific_papers.notes: Use for finding additional HC-PCF primary studies and controlled vocabulary.

scientific_papers.name: Dantl et al. 2022 - Stimuli-responsive one-dimensional photonic crystals: design, fabrication and sensing
scientific_papers.license: RSC open-access article license; verify exact reuse terms before redistribution

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: snowballing and fabrication-method vocabulary extraction
extraction_strategy.target_content: 1D photonic crystal sensor classes and stimuli-response mechanisms

scientific_papers.notes: Review source for 1D photonic crystal sensing mechanisms and fabrication terms.

scientific_papers.name: Chiappini et al. 2020 - Photonic crystal stimuli-responsive chromatic sensors: a short review

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: snowballing for chromatic photonic crystal sensor examples
extraction_strategy.target_content: chromatic readout, stimuli classes, references to primary articles

scientific_papers.notes: Use as a source-discovery review for chromatic sensor examples.

supplementary_materials.name: Supplementary information for Wang et al. 2022 UiO-66 3D photonic crystal sensor
supplementary_materials.license: same as article or publisher supplementary terms; verify before redistribution

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: download supplementary PDF, then manual table/figure check

supplementary_materials.notes: Expected to support fabrication and measurement-context fields for UiO-66 records.

supplementary_materials.name: Supplementary information for Shaban et al. 2017 plasmonic/1D photonic crystal

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: manual supplementary PDF review

supplementary_materials.notes: Use to confirm optical spectra and fabrication conditions when main-text figures are ambiguous.

supplementary_materials.name: Supporting information for Chong et al. 2018 SEIRA on-chip gas sensing
supplementary_materials.license: ACS publisher terms; reuse not assumed

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: manual review after confirming access and reuse permissions

supplementary_materials.notes: Useful for device-fabrication and gas-exposure details.

databases.name: MOF-based SERS substrates dataset
databases.license: CC-BY-4.0; cite dataset creators and original papers when reused

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: use as an external validation and comparison source for MOF/plasmonic sensing records
extraction_strategy.target_content: MOF name, metal configuration, analyte phase, LOD, linear range, recovery, and DOI fields

databases.notes: Best overlap with this project because it combines material/substrate, analyte, performance metrics, and bibliographic provenance. It is SERS-focused rather than photonic-crystal-focused, so values should be used for comparison rather than automatic replacement.

databases.name: OpticalMaterials.org refractive-index and dielectric-constant databases
databases.license: database available for download; verify reuse terms and cite the Scientific Data paper

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: query by material, compound formula, SMILES, or DOI for optical-property cross-checks
extraction_strategy.target_content: refractive index, dielectric constant, wavelength, extracted value, raw value, and DOI

databases.notes: Useful for checking whether reported refractive-index-related sensor behavior is physically plausible and for enriching material/analyte optical context.

databases.name: RefractiveIndex.INFO optical constants database
databases.access_method: GitHub YAML database or refractiveindex.info website
databases.license: open-source database; verify repository license before redistribution

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: lookup materials and optical constants for photonic layers, metals, and sensor environments
extraction_strategy.target_content: n/k values, wavelength range, material page, and source reference

databases.notes: Best reference source for optical constants of materials used in photonic and plasmonic sensor architectures. It usually validates material properties rather than sensor performance metrics.

databases.name: PubChem compound records for analytes and solvents
databases.license: NIH/NLM open data terms; verify per downloaded record

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: API lookup for standardized analyte names and formulae only

databases.notes: Does not provide sensor-performance values; use only for chemical-name normalization.

databases.name: PubMed Central open-access full-text records
databases.access_method: PMC article page and PDF where available

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: use as a fallback full-text mirror for open biomedical/nanophotonic papers

databases.notes: Use only when publisher HTML is unavailable or to cross-check open-access status.

aggregators.name: Crossref DOI metadata
aggregators.license: metadata license depends on Crossref member deposits

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: DOI metadata validation only

aggregators.notes: Use to validate bibliographic metadata; not a source of measurement values.

aggregators.name: OpenAlex scholarly metadata

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: reference snowballing and open-access status check

aggregators.notes: Use for discovery and metadata enrichment, not for extracting sensor metrics.

aggregators.name: Semantic Scholar paper metadata
aggregators.access_method: web lookup or API subject to rate limits

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: citation snowballing only

aggregators.notes: Useful for finding related primary papers after the initial source set.
